differential_diagnoses: Extrahepatic portal vein thrombosis (cavernous transformation) secondary to prior abdominal trauma
Occult hypercoagulable state resulting in chronic portal vein thrombosis
next_steps: CT angiography of the abdomen to evaluate for mesenteric artery stenosis or compression
Transjugular liver biopsy with portal pressure measurements
Stool studies and serology for Schistosoma species
Hematology consultation for a comprehensive thrombophilia workup
Echocardiogram to exclude subtle right-sided heart disease
Continue nonselective beta-blocker therapy and proceed with elective variceal banding
